headline: Marathon Petroleum Corp. names Brian Worthington vice president, Investor Relations; Kristina Kazarian to become vice president, Finance and Treasurer
summary: Marathon Petroleum Corp. (NYSE: MPC) announced today that Brian Worthington has been named vice president, Investor Relations. Worthington succeeds Kristina Kazarian, who will become vice president, Finance and Treasurer. Both appointments are effective May 25.

content.title: Marathon Petroleum Corp. names Brian Worthington vice president, Investor Relations; Kristina Kazarian to become vice president, Finance and Treasurer

headline: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Massive Life Support’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment Monday as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.
